name: copilot-role-router
description: Multi-role agent orchestrator for GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, Gemini CLI / Antigravity, and Cursor. CO is the sole entry point; delegates to Recon, Medic, Engineer, QA, Scribe, and Judge.

scripts.release: node scripts/build.mjs && git add .github/extensions/role-router/extension.mjs && git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "chore: build v$(node -p \"require('./package.json').version\")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push origin main --tags
